author: research-shell-nix
content:
## Test Results - shell.nix inside crosslink-sandbox

All verified working inside the sandbox (nix fallback mode, no .conda-env):

| Tool | Version | Status |
|------|---------|--------|
| python3 | 3.14.3 | OK |
| git | 2.53.0 | OK |
| gh | 2.88.1 | OK |
| node | 24.14.0 | OK |
| pytest | 9.0.2 | OK |
| pre-commit | 4.5.1 | OK |
| geckodriver | 0.36.0 | (available) |
| selenium | 4.40.0 | OK (via python3) |
| `import openwpm` | - | OK |

Extension build (`npm run build`): needs `npm install` first (node_modules gitignored) — npm is available, so `npm install && npm run build` works.

Key missing from nix fallback: gcsfs, s3fs (blocked by cfn-lint not supporting py3.14), domain-utils, tranco, pytest-split (not in nixpkgs). These would need pip install or .conda-env mode.
